concerns.text: Phase 8 tasks (T060-T065) directly contradict spec.md's explicit out-of-scope declarations regarding experimental validation and hydration state. This violates the Constitution's Single Source of Truth (Principle I) and introduces a requirement not present in the original specification.
Inconsistent path conventions between tasks.md and constitution.md (projects/001... vs projects/PROJ-262...). This creates ambiguity and potential errors in file access and project structure.
T032 validates against QM9 data, which is also the training data, creating circular validation. FR-011 requires validation against reference data, but this is not an independent verification.

T064 updates spec.md Assumptions regarding single-conformer limitation, but this limitation is *already* documented in spec.md, indicating a failure to properly update the specification before task creation.
Unclear ownership of responsibility between T034 (metrics.csv generation) and T044 (confidence interval computation). Both tasks relate to the same output and require clarification.
